name: DurableUnEvaluationResults
description: Model evaluation scores (FA, RA, Q-INT4, Q-INT8, MIA-AUC, cert) from machine unlearning experiments evaluating 7 methods on LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct with the TOFU benchmark. Results support the NeurIPS 2026 paper: DurableUn: INT4 Quantization as a Recovery Attack on Machine Unlearning.
citation: @inproceedings{durableun2026, title={DurableUn: INT4 Quantization as a Recovery Attack on Machine Unlearning, the FA--RA--Robustness Trilemma, and Sharpness-Aware Forgetting}, author={Anonymous}, booktitle={Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems}, year={2026}}
cr:annotationsPerItem: N/A — benchmark contains model evaluation scores, not human annotations.
cr:annotatorDemographics: N/A — benchmark contains model evaluation scores, not human annotations.
cr:dataCollection: Automatically generated by running unlearning experiments with pinned random seeds on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090. No human annotation was performed.

distribution.name: results_directory
distribution.description: CSV files containing per-method evaluation metrics for all experimental runs.

recordSet.name: evaluation_results
recordSet.description: Per-run model evaluation metrics from unlearning experiments.

field.name: method
field.description: Unlearning method name (ga, npo, scrub, salun, rmu, alpha_edit, graddiff, saf_alpha*)

field.name: seed
field.description: Random seed used for the run (42, 123, or 5508)

field.name: forget_acc
field.description: Token-level forget accuracy (FA) — lower is better unlearning

field.name: retain_acc
field.description: Token-level retain accuracy (RA) — higher is less collateral damage

field.name: quant_int8
field.description: Forget accuracy after symmetric INT8 quantization (Q-INT8)

field.name: quant_int4
field.description: Forget accuracy after symmetric per-row INT4 quantization (Q-INT4)

field.name: wall_min
field.description: Training wall time in minutes on RTX 4090
